title: Harriett Has a Sweet Tooth
intro: After a busy week, Harriet finally has time to unwind with her favorite snack.
description: After a busy week, Harriet finally has time to unwind. She decides to host a movie night with her friend, the Gingerbread Man. She teases that he's in for a sweet treat. Later, Harriett is seen enjoying her favorite kind of snack. A Gingerbread cookie. Her friend sits slumped over on the couch. Some snacks you can't get enough of.
